mapper.sql: g.goods_id, g.goods_name, g.goods_type, g.cover_image, g.description, g.points_price, g.cash_price, g.stock, g.stock_warning, g.role_limit, g.status, cast(json_unquote(json_extract(g.remark, '$.couponTemplateId')) as unsigned) as coupon_template_id, cast(json_unquote(json_extract(g.remark, '$.rightsTemplateId')) as unsigned) as rights_template_id, json_unquote(json_extract(g.remark, '$.virtualTargetType')) as virtual_target_type, g.create_time, g.update_time
mapper.select:
select from jst_mall_goods g where g.del_flag = '0' and g.status = 'on'
and g.goods_name like concat('%', #{goodsName}, '%')
and g.goods_type in ('coupon', 'rights')
and g.goods_type = #{goodsType}
order by g.create_time desc, g.goods_id desc
select from jst_mall_goods g where g.goods_id = #{goodsId} and g.del_flag = '0' limit 1
select * from jst_mall_goods where goods_id = #{goodsId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1 for update
mapper.update: update jst_mall_goods set stock = case when stock = -1 then -1 else stock - #{quantity} end, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where goods_id = #{goodsId} and del_flag = '0' and (stock = -1 or stock >= #{quantity})
